title: SwarmRoute: SWAP-Minimal Hand-off Routing on a Drone Mesh
strategies: trivial: route each hand-off on a fresh identity layout via shortest path, then undo (matches checker baseline)
greedy: single evolving layout, input order, no undo (reuse drift)
strong: nearest-first schedule on the evolving layout, no undo (minimize cumulative routing)
invalid: infeasible program, executes no required hand-off
